subscription.noPlans: No plans available for this category.

subscription.guaranteeDesc: Try risk-free. If you're not satisfied, get a full refund within 30 days.

plan.title: Choose your learning plan
plan.subtitle: Pick the level of AI support you need without wading through a long list of technical settings.
plan.groupScopeSubtitle: This plan applies only to the current group workspace. Group subscriptions are managed separately from personal plans.
plan.groupEntryTitle: Group plans are managed inside each group
plan.groupScopeLeaderDesc: This purchase only applies to {{groupName}}. As the group leader, you can choose or change the plan for this workspace here.
plan.groupScopeMemberDesc: This purchase only applies to {{groupName}}. Only the group leader can choose or change the plan for this workspace.
plan.groupEntryDesc: Group subscriptions are purchased separately inside each group workspace. Open a group you lead to view its plans and complete checkout there.

creditModel.title: Credit model for AI
creditModel.desc: Buy the plan once, then top up Credits only when you need more AI usage.

descriptions.free: Start with the essentials for quiz creation and lightweight study sessions.
descriptions.freeWithLimits: A solid starting point with {{workspaces}} workspaces and {{materials}} materials in each workspace.
descriptions.standard: Expand your daily study flow with more helpful AI tools.
descriptions.recommended: Unlock the full learning workflow with clearer, more practical AI support.
descriptions.premium: Built for focused study sessions with broader AI support and deeper insight.
descriptions.group: Designed for study groups or classrooms that want shared AI-powered workflows.
descriptions.groupWithLimits: A shared study space with {{workspaces}} workspaces and {{materials}} materials per workspace.
descriptions.includesPreviousSimple: Everything in {{previousPlan}}, with a fuller study workflow.

bullets.groupCollab: Shared setup for team study and collaborative material work
bullets.coreAi: Covers the core AI quiz workflow
bullets.upgradedLimits: Upgrades to {{workspaces}} workspaces and {{materials}} materials per workspace
bullets.roadmaps: Generate AI study roadmaps from your materials and goals
bullets.companion: Use an AI companion for quick questions and guided practice
bullets.summaries: Read and summarize dense materials faster with AI
bullets.analytics: Track progress and weak spots with learning analytics
bullets.advancedQuiz: Unlock more advanced quiz types for deeper practice

studyFeatures.title: Premium study tools
studyFeatures.subtitle: Paid plans unlock more practical ways to use AI throughout your study workflow.

roadmap.title: AI study roadmaps
roadmap.desc: Turn materials into a step-by-step study path that is easier to follow.

companion.title: AI companion
companion.desc: Ask quick questions, review faster, and keep momentum while you study.

summary.title: Smart summaries
summary.desc: Condense long materials into the main ideas so review takes less time.

analytics.title: Learning analytics
analytics.desc: Spot strengths, weak areas, and progress patterns sooner.

advancedQuiz.title: Advanced quiz modes
advancedQuiz.desc: Unlock broader quiz setups and more flexible practice sessions.

notes.permanentDesc: Plans do not have to be monthly. Depending on configuration, some plans can be purchased permanently.
notes.creditsDesc: AI features only consume Credits when you actually use them, so spend stays easier to control.
notes.refundDesc: Payments are secured and your Credit purchase history stays available in the wallet.

payment.invoiceDesc: Review your subscription plan and choose a payment method

payment.selectGroupDesc: Choose a group you lead to apply this subscription plan.

paymentResult.successDesc: Your subscription plan has been activated.
paymentResult.failDesc: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
